const maxSatisfying = (versions, range, options) => {
  let max = null
  let maxSV = null
  let rangeObj = null
  try {
    rangeObj = new Range(range, options)
  } catch (er) {
    return null
  }
  versions.forEach((v) => {
    if (rangeObj.test(v)) {
      // satisfies(v, range, options)
      if (!max || maxSV.compare(v) === -1) {
        // compare(max, v, true)
        max = v
        maxSV = new SemVer(max, options)
      }
    }
  })
  return max
}
module.exports = maxSatisfying
